# PAS

PAS workspace defines DOT-based AI pipeline orchestration. 8-crate Rust monorepo executes Graphviz digraphs via `pas` CLI, managing LLM agent loops, checkpoint/resume state, and multi-provider API abstractions.

## Stack

Cargo.toml defines workspace. 8 crates: `attractor-types` (shared errors/context), `attractor-dot` (DOT parser), `attractor-llm` (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini clients), `attractor-tools` (trait/registry), `attractor-agent` (steering loops), `attractor-pipeline` (graph engine/handlers/validation), `attractor-cli` (binary), `attractor-web` (Leptos frontend).
Deps: tokio="1", serde="1", reqwest="0.12", clap="4", tracing="0.1", uuid="1", anyhow="1", thiserror="2".
License: MIT OR Apache-2.0. Version 0.6.0 unified in root.

## Subdirectories

[crates/](./crates/) ‚Äî Workspace members. `attractor-web` implements Leptos SSR/hydrate frontend. 8 crates: `attractor-types`, `attractor-dot`, `attractor-llm`, `attractor-tools`, `attractor-agent`, `attractor-pipeline`, `attractor-cli`, `attractor-web`.
[docs/](./docs/) ‚Äî Architecture specifications (C4 models, distributed execution flows, verification layers), CLI reference, user guides.
[templates/](./templates/) ‚Äî DOT workflow definitions (`epic-runner.dot`, `plan-to-execute.dot`) and markdown schema templates (`prd-template.md`, `spec-template.md`).
[.vscode/](./.vscode/) ‚Äî Visual Studio Code settings. Configures `files.exclude` pattern `**/*.sum` to hide checksum files from Explorer view.

## Contents

[Cargo.toml](./Cargo.toml) ‚Äî Workspace manifest. Defines members, shared deps, release profiles (`lto=thin`, `codegen-units=16`).
[install.sh](./install.sh) ‚Äî Builds `pas` binary via `cargo build -p attractor-cli`, installs to `${HOME}/.local/bin/pas`. Supports `--fast` flag, `PAS_PROFILE` env override, and macOS `codesign` via `CODESIGN_IDENTITY`.
[README.md](./README.md) ‚Äî Project overview. CLI commands (`run`, `validate`, `info`, `plan`, `decompose`, `generate`, `scaffold`), architecture, node attributes.
[LICENSE-APACHE](./LICENSE-APACHE) ‚Äî Apache-2.0 license text.
[LICENSE-MIT](./LICENSE-MIT) ‚Äî MIT license text.

## Architecture Data Flow

Pipeline execution spans 3 tiers:

**CLI (`attractor-cli`)**: `pas run <pipeline.dot>` parses DOT via `attractor-dot` ‚Üí builds `PipelineGraph` ‚Üí `PipelineRunner` traverses nodes ‚Üí dispatches handlers (`codergen`, `tool`, `wait_human`) ‚Üí checkpoints state.

**Web (`attractor-web`)**: Leptos WASM frontend ‚Üí Axum SSR backend ‚Üí spawns `pas decompose`/`scaffold`/`run` ‚Üí SSE streams events (`node_start`, `node_complete`, `pipeline_complete`).

**Engine (`attractor-pipeline`)**: `Engine` loops through graph. `select_edge()` applies 5-step priority (condition ‚Üí preferred_label ‚Üí suggested_next_ids ‚Üí weight ‚Üí lexical). `enforce_goal_gate()` triggers 4-level retry resolution. Handlers in `src/handlers/` execute `claude -p` calls or shell commands.

## Behavioral Contracts

**DOT Node Shapes**

- `Mdiamond` ‚Üí StartHandler (exactly one required)
- `Msquare` ‚Üí ExitHandler + goal gate (exactly one required)
- `box` ‚Üí CodergenHandler (LLM execution, requires `prompt` attribute)
- `diamond` ‚Üí ConditionalHandler (routes via response label scan)
- `parallelogram` ‚Üí ToolHandler (shell via `tool_command`)
- `hexagon` ‚Üí WaitHumanHandler (human `preferred_label` gate)

**Edge Selection Priority**

1. `condition` expression match (highest `weight`, lexical tiebreak)
2. `preferred_label` match (case-insensitive, strips `&` prefix)
3. `suggested_next_ids` contains target ID
4. Highest `weight` numeric value
5. Lexical target ID ordering

**Validation Rules (12 total)**
Errors: `StartNodeRule`, `TerminalNodeRule`, `ReachabilityRule`, `EdgeTargetExistsRule`, `StartNoIncomingRule`, `ExitNoOutgoingRule`, `ConditionSyntaxRule`.
Warnings: `FidelityValidRule` (full|truncate|compact|summary), `RetryTargetExistsRule`, `GoalGateHasRetryRule`, `ProviderValidRule` (claude|codex|gemini), `PromptOnLlmNodesRule`.

**Response Tokens (verbatim)**
Conditional nodes emit final-line tokens:

- `MORE` ‚Äî Tasks remain, continue workflow
- `DONE` ‚Äî No tasks remain, exit to done node
- `PASS` ‚Äî Verification succeeded
- `FAIL` ‚Äî Verification failed, route to fixup

**Variable Expansion**
`${ctx.key}` expands to graph attributes or prior node results (`{node_id}.result`) inside `prompt` strings.

**State File Paths**

- `.pas/current_task.md` ‚Äî Active task ID
- `.pas/investigation.md` ‚Äî Analysis output
- `.pas/test-results.md` ‚Äî Validation results
- `.pas/spec.md` ‚Äî Technical specification
- `.pas/prd.md` ‚Äî Product requirements

**CLI Interface**
`pas decompose <SPEC>` outputs `Epic ID: attractor-[a-z0-9]+`.
`pas scaffold <EPIC_ID>` writes `pipelines/<EPIC_ID>.dot`.
`pas run` invokes `claude -p` with `--output-format json`, `--no-session-persistence`, `--dangerously-skip-permissions`.

## Reproduction-Critical Constants

- Epic ID regex: `attractor-[a-z0-9]+`
- Event replay buffer: `100` events per session
- Exponential backoff: `0.5s`, `1s`, `2s`, `4s`, cap `30s`
- Default max steps: `200`
- Timeout tiers: Trivial `120s`, Light `300s`, Standard `600s`, Heavy `900s`, Intensive `1200s`
- Full epic-runner prompts: [templates/epic-runner.annex.sum](./templates/epic-runner.annex.sum)
- Full plan-to-execute prompts: [templates/plan-to-execute.annex.sum](./templates/plan-to-execute.annex.sum)

## Workflow & Conventions

**Build & Test**

```bash
cargo build --release          # Build CLI binary `pas`
cargo test                     # Run all tests
cargo test -p attractor-dot    # Test single crate
cargo clippy --workspace       # Lint
cargo fmt --all -- --check     # Format check
```

Install via `./install.sh` or `cargo install --path crates/attractor-cli`.

**Versioning**
Single version in workspace root `Cargo.toml` under `[workspace.package]`. All crates inherit via `version.workspace = true`. **Never set versions directly in individual crates.** Bump only in root, then run `cargo check`.

## Key Gotchas

- The default `codergen` handler shells out to the local `claude` CLI ‚Äî it requires Claude Code installed, no API key needed
- Direct LLM handlers (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini) need their respective `*_API_KEY` env vars
- Pipeline files use a strict DOT subset ‚Äî see `docs/dot-dialect.md` for the grammar, supported features, and what breaks the parser. Read this before generating or editing `.dot` files.
- Integration tests are in `crates/attractor-pipeline/tests/integration.rs`
